deprecations.subject: AICFilter.create_vad_analyzer
deprecations.message: `AICFilter.create_vad_analyzer` is deprecated since 1.4.0 and will be removed in 1.6.0. Use `AICQuailVADAnalyzer` instead.

deprecations.subject: ResampyResampler
deprecations.message: `ResampyResampler` is deprecated since 1.2.0 and will be removed in 2.0.0. Use `SOXRAudioResampler`, `create_file_resampler()`, or `create_stream_resampler()` instead.

deprecations.subject: LocalCoreMLSmartTurnAnalyzer
deprecations.message: `LocalCoreMLSmartTurnAnalyzer` is deprecated since 0.0.106 and will be removed in 2.0.0. Use `LocalSmartTurnAnalyzerV3` instead.

deprecations.subject: LocalSmartTurnAnalyzerV2
deprecations.message: `LocalSmartTurnAnalyzerV2` is deprecated since 0.0.106 and will be removed in 2.0.0. Use `LocalSmartTurnAnalyzerV3` instead.

deprecations.subject: AICQuailVADAnalyzer.minimum_speech_duration
deprecations.message: Use :class:`VADParams` (``start_secs``/``stop_secs``) instead. ``minimum_speech_duration`` is ignored and will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: AICQuailVADAnalyzer.sensitivity
deprecations.message: Use :class:`VADParams` (``confidence``) instead. ``sensitivity`` is ignored and will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: AICQuailVADAnalyzer.speech_hold_duration
deprecations.message: Use :class:`VADParams` (``start_secs``/``stop_secs``) instead. ``speech_hold_duration`` is ignored and will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: AICVADAnalyzer
deprecations.message: `AICVADAnalyzer` is deprecated since 1.4.0 and will be removed in 1.6.0. Use `AICQuailVADAnalyzer` instead.

deprecations.subject: pipecat.audio.vad.aic_vad
deprecations.message: Use :class:`AICQuailVADAnalyzer` instead. Will be removed in 1.6.0.

deprecations.subject: FlowManager.task
deprecations.message: Use ``worker`` instead. Will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: FlowManager.task
deprecations.message: `FlowManager.task` is deprecated since 1.5.0 and will be removed in 2.0.0. Use `FlowManager.worker` instead.

deprecations.subject: ContextStrategy.RESET_WITH_SUMMARY
deprecations.message: Use :class:`LLMSummarizeContextFrame` instead — push it in a pre-action to trigger on-demand summarization during a node transition. See https://docs.pipecat.ai/guides/fundamentals/context-summarization. Will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: ContextStrategyConfig.summary_prompt
deprecations.message: Use ``LLMContextSummaryConfig.summarization_prompt`` instead. Deprecated together with ``RESET_WITH_SUMMARY``. Will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: FlowResult
deprecations.message: `FlowResult` is deprecated since 1.5.0 and will be removed in 2.0.0. No replacement.

deprecations.subject: NodeConfig.role_messages

deprecations.subject: RTVIProcessor.handle_function_call
deprecations.message: This method is deprecated. Function call events are now automatically sent by :class:`RTVIObserver` using the ``llm-function-call-in-progress`` event. Configure reporting level via ``RTVIObserverParams.function_call_report_level``. Will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: RTVIProcessor.transport
deprecations.message: No replacement; the parameter is ignored. Will be removed in 2.0.0. The processor no longer needs a transport reference — audio input and audio-streaming start are driven by frames (:class:`InputAudioRawFrame` and :class:`InputTransportStartAudioStreamingFrame`) pushed downstream. For client-ready audio gating, set ``audio_in_stream_on_start=False`` on the transport params.

deprecations.subject: ElevenLabsHttpTTSService.pronunciation_dictionary_locators
deprecations.message: Use the ``text_transforms`` parameter with :func:`pipecat.utils.text.transforms.replace_text` instead. Pronunciation dictionary substitutions can rewrite the spoken words in ways that no longer match the text sent to synthesis, which breaks the alignment-based word-completion tracking used to attribute spoken text back to the conversation context. ``replace_text`` transforms happen client-side, so they're tracked correctly. Will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: tool.timeout
deprecations.message: Use ``timeout_secs`` instead. Will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: WorkerRunner.loop
deprecations.message: Use ``task_manager`` (which owns its own loop) instead. ``loop`` will be removed in 2.0.0.

deprecations.subject: WorkerRunner.run.worker
deprecations.message: Register the worker with :meth:`add_workers` before calling ``run()`` instead. Will be removed in 2.0.0.
